title: ORA Mission, Vision & Strategic Goals
vision: ORA provides research oversight and superb service to MSU researchers and their partners, one that propels MSU to the R1 space.
mission: The ORA will provide oversight and high-quality service to MSU researchers and research partners and work closely with the funding agencies.
service_principles: Highly respected by clients and partners for accuracy of oversight and quality of service
strategic_goals: Enhance ORA staff and campus knowledge regarding grant preparation, submission, and management
Provide grants oversight for compliance matters
Enhance the efficiency of ORA services
Improve customer service to faculty, students, budget officers, research partners, and funding agencies
Facilitate research and offer consultation on strategies to streamline processes and increase research funding
content:
ORA Vision: "ORA provides research oversight and superb service to MSU researchers and their partners, one that propels MSU to the R1 space."

ORA Mission: "The ORA will provide oversight and high-quality service to MSU researchers and research partners and work closely with the funding agencies." Service will be highly effective, efficient, and respectful, and aims to be highly respected by its clients and partners for its accuracy of oversight and quality of service.

Strategic Goals:
  1. Enhance ORA staff and campus knowledge regarding grant preparation, submission, and management.
  2. Provide grants oversight for compliance matters.
  3. Enhance the efficiency of ORA services.
  4. Improve customer service to faculty, students, budget officers, research partners, and funding agencies.
  5. Facilitate research and offer consultation on strategies to streamline processes and increase research funding.
